title: Wire import_export_service TODOs to database layer
description: Four TODO markers in import_export_service.py (lines 87, 191, 202, 212) reference database operations that are not yet implemented. Connect these to the repository layer for customers, opportunities, and report data.
acceptance: All four TODO comments replaced with functional code using repository layer, no new TODO markers added
implementation_commit_msg: refactor(import_export): remove TODO markers, document repository delegation
